markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Refine content strategy and streamline the article review process.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** Pivoting from AI-generated thought leadership to SEO-driven educational content. This resolves issues with self-serving angles and overly confident claims (e.g., "must-have" features).](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)
  - [**New Content Pipeline:** A new agentic pipeline is approved for its superior quality, featuring more citations (from credible sources like Accenture, BCG) and a more actionable FAQ format.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [**Streamlined Review Workflow:** A new Notion workflow will unblock the review queue. It assigns articles to SMEs, uses a "Needs Edits" column for revisions, and adds a time-in-stage tracker to monitor velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [**Future "Recipe Book" Project:** A long-term project was approved to create a programmatic "recipe book" of practical AI agent use cases, inspired by Zapier and Clay. This will require engineering support.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=3097.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality & Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Initial AI-generated content was too self-serving and lacked depth, leading to titles like "practical framework" and aggressive angles like "why integration beats best-of-breed tools."](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new agentic pipeline was approved for its superior quality, featuring more citations from credible sources (Accenture, BCG) and a more actionable FAQ format.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [**Decision:** The strategy will pivot to SEO-driven educational content. Articles with self-serving angles will be revised to be more helpful and less product-focused.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [**Problem:** The article review queue in Notion was blocked, slowing publishing velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new workflow was established to streamline reviews:](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
      - [**Assignment:** David/Franki assign articles to the relevant SME.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
      - [**SME Action:** The SME leaves comments and moves the article to "Needs Edits."](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - [**GrowthX Action:** Bailey's team makes revisions and moves the article to "Final CMO Review."](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - [**Tracking:** A "time in stage" tracker will be added to monitor velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)

### New Content Pipeline & Future Projects

  - [**New Topics:** GrowthX generated \~40 new SEO-focused article ideas in Airtable, mixing high-volume general topics with low-volume, high-intent keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)
  - [**Podcast Repurposing:** Transcripts will be used for quotes and insights in new articles. Short-form video clips will also be embedded to boost engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=2293.0)
  - [**"Recipe Book" Project:** A long-term project was approved to create a programmatic "recipe book" of practical AI agent use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=3097.0)
      - [**Goal:** Inspire users with concrete examples of how to apply HX agents.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=3370.0)
      - [**Inspiration:** Zapier's integration pages and Clay's agent examples.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=3434.0)
      - [**Ownership:** Jakub (GrowthX) will scope the project, which will require engineering support.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=3297.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:** Change titles for "Data ingestion software..." and "12 must-have features..." articles.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [**Bailey:** Revise articles with self-serving angles (e.g., "why integration beats best-of-breed tools").](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [**Bailey:** Add a "time in stage" tracker to the Notion content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [**David:** Review the \~40 new content ideas in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=2560.0)
  - [**David:** Provide Jakub with examples of programmatic "recipe book" content.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=3434.0)
  - [**Franki:** Assign remaining articles in the Notion review queue to the correct SME.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=3511.0)
  - [**Franki:** Provide GrowthX access to podcast video clips for embedding.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=2469.0)
  - [**Jakub:** Begin scoping the "recipe book" project.](https://fathom.video/share/-DysZosfFcQcdxyqurxFfUqaDbaCbTKc?tab=summary&timestamp=3297.0)
